name: TMS GEARS REPORT
query:
select 
C.name as "Customer:Link/Customer:200",
C.customer_name as "Customer Name:Data:200",
C.customer_group as "Customer Group:Data:200",
COALESCE((Select Sum(SI.total) from `tabSales Invoice` SI where C.name = SI.customer and SI.docstatus = 1 and (DATE(SI.posting_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)),0) as "Sales Value:Data:200",
COALESCE((Select Sum(DCI.qty * I.last_purchase_rate)
from `tabDelivery Note` DC 
inner join `tabDelivery Note Item` DCI on DC.name = DCI.parent
left outer join `tabItem` I on I.name = DCI.item_code
where C.name = DC.customer and DC.docstatus = 1 and (DATE(DC.posting_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)),0) as "DC Value:Data:200"

from
`tabCustomer` C where C.customer_group like "%%TMS%%" 
 Group by C.name
